caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt and a dark blue baseball cap with a silver logo sits in a recording studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and a silver chain, speaking into a professional microphone positioned directly in front of him. In the background, a white wall features yellow text and stars, while a screen displays the word "BOSS." Overlaid on the scene is a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101." The man is captured in mid-conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. Throughout the sequence, his posture and expression remain relatively consistent, though his hands shift slightly as he continues to talk, moving from a more open position to bringing his hands closer together in front of his chest.
